evidence_description: Annual board security review minutes reviewed and approved security charter
Org chart and RACI reviewed — all security roles documented
Policy acknowledgment records reviewed — 98% completion rate
Annual policy re-acknowledgment — 96% completion at time of review
Security objectives communication log and all-hands security briefing records reviewed
Annual risk assessment completed and approved by Risk Committee
Q3 risk register review — 12 risks reviewed 2 elevated
Q4 risk register review completed
Q1 risk register review completed
Q2 risk register review completed
Monitoring dashboard screenshot showing uptime and alert configuration
Q4 monitoring report reviewed — 3 alerts triggered and resolved
Q1 monitoring report reviewed
Control design documentation reviewed and approved
MFA enforcement confirmed across all production systems via Okta admin console
MFA enforcement re-verified — 2 service accounts identified without MFA
Sample of 10 provisioning tickets reviewed — all had manager approval
Sample of 5 termination tickets reviewed — 4 deprovisioned same day 1 delayed 3 days
Q3 access review report reviewed — 847 accounts reviewed 23 access rights removed
Q4 access review report reviewed
Q1 access review completed
Q2 access review completed
Firewall rules and VPN configuration reviewed — all external access requires VPN + MFA
Firewall rule review — one legacy rule found allowing broad inbound access
Weekly vulnerability scan reports reviewed for sample of 12 weeks — all scans completed on schedule
Weekly vulnerability scan reports reviewed for Q1 — 2 critical vulnerabilities identified
Incident log reviewed — 4 incidents logged in audit period all closed within SLA
IRP document v3.2 reviewed and dated within audit period
Annual tabletop exercise conducted — cross-functional participation confirmed
Post-incident review records reviewed for 2 incidents — recovery procedures followed
Sample of 15 change tickets reviewed — all had testing sign-off and CAB approval
Sample of 10 change tickets reviewed — 1 emergency change lacked documented rollback plan
Vendor risk assessments reviewed for top 10 vendors — all completed within 12 months
Annual vendor reassessments reviewed — 2 vendors overdue by 30+ days
Uptime report reviewed — 99.97% availability achieved against 99.9% SLA
Q1 uptime report — 99.94% availability achieved
Incident post-mortems reviewed — root cause and remediation documented for all P1 incidents
Backup logs reviewed for 3-month sample — all backups completed successfully
Recovery test conducted — RTO of 3.5 hours achieved against 4-hour target
Backup logs reviewed Q1 — one backup failure detected and re-run within 2 hours
Data classification policy reviewed and current — data inventory reviewed for completeness
Encryption at rest confirmed via AWS KMS configuration review
TLS configuration reviewed — all endpoints confirmed TLS 1.2 or higher
Data access control lists reviewed — confidential data access restricted to named roles
Access to confidential data re-reviewed — one overly broad role identified
Data disposal records reviewed for decommissioned systems — certificates of destruction on file
NDA log reviewed — all active employees and contractors have signed NDAs
Third-party NDA log reviewed — 1 vendor missing current NDA
